candidate_summary: Retrograde reasoning compile-cache: backward-compute optimal CoT from answer, store, replay at inference.
hit_rule: hit = kw>=2 OR cos>=0.7 OR judge>=0.7

results.title: DOTS: Learning Optimal Reasoning Trajectories (ICLR 2025)
results.judge_reason: Directly selects optimal reasoning trajectories; aligns with 'optimal CoT' precomputation idea, though learned not retrograde-DP.

results.title: The Evolution of Thought: LLM Overthinking via Reasoning Dynamics
results.judge_reason: Describes convergence/basin dynamics of reasoning, but does not precompute or cache optimal CoT backward from answer.

results.title: Internalizing LLM Reasoning via Discovery and Replay of Latent Actions
results.judge_reason: Discover latent reasoning actions and replay them at inference; direct functional analog of tablebase-style compile-cache-then-replay of CoT, even if not strictly retrograde-computed.

results.title: Dynamics-Aware Solver Generation
results.judge_reason: Uses Lyapunov decay rate and trajectory-aware control for solver scheduling; overlaps stability vocabulary but not retrograde compile-cache of CoT.

results.title: Survey of Frontiers in LLM Reasoning
results.judge_reason: Broad survey of inference-scaling and reasoning; no specific match to retrograde/compile-cache CoT.

results.title: Slow-Fast Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
results.judge_reason: Reposition-before-update policy optimization; unrelated to precomputed retrograde CoT cache.

results.title: Endgame tablebase
results.judge_reason: Pure source-domain description (chess tablebase) with no LLM/reasoning application; counts as source-side only, not an LLM-side hit.

verdict: candidate is partially covered by prior work (DOTS optimal-trajectory selection, latent-action discovery+replay, dynamics-aware Lyapunov trajectory control); not novel as stated
